ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creator of the publication */,
  "publication_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of publication (e.g., Student, Faculty) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Institution where the research was conducted */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "full_text_link" TEXT /* Link to the full-text document */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publication_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_type_id") REFERENCES publication_types ("publication_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the creator belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Additional affiliation details */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID */,
  "profile_link" TEXT /* Link to the creator's profile page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creators_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "publication_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the department belongs to */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_authors" (
  "co_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-author relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creator who is a co-author */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the co-author's contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_authors_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication version */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was published */,
  "changes_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "file_link" TEXT /* Link to the version-specific file */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peer review */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the reviewer */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation from the reviewer (e.g., Accept, Revise, Reject) */,
  "review_score" INTEGER /* Numeric score given by the reviewer */,
  "confidential_comments" TEXT /* Confidential comments for the editorial team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviews_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the reviewer belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews conducted by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the publication was accessed */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_access_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
